name: Aoyama Trading Co., Ltd.
summary: Aoyama Trading Co., Ltd. engages in business wear, casual wear, credit card, printing and media, sundry sales, repair service, and other businesses in Japan and internationally. The company offers business wear, such as suits, jackets, slacks, coats, formal wear, and other clothing items; and casual wear, such as jeans. It also issues and manages credit cards, as well as provides small-amount finance; offers a range of sales promotion services, including distributing flyers and direct mails; and publishes magazines. In addition, the company provides repair services for shoes and key duplication under the Mister Minit brand; sells daily merchandise and processed foods; and operates restaurants and fitness gyms. Further, it operates in the web media business. As of March 31, 2020, the company operated 809 Yofuku-no-Aoyama stores; 56 The Suit Company stores; 9 Universal Language stores; 8 White The Suit Company stores; 5 Universal Language Measure's stores; and 30 Aoyama Suits stores. It also operated 12 LEVI'S stores; 15 2nd STREET stores; 2 JUMBLE STORE stores; 100 Yen shop Daiso stores and 6 WTW stores for sundry and interior products; and 35 Yakiniku King restaurants, 11 Yuzu An restaurants, and 1 Anytime Fitness center for gyms. Aoyama Trading Co., Ltd. was founded in 1964 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
